description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the java:8 Docker image and define GRADLE_VERSION='2.13' and GRAILS_VERSION=3.1.9 variables. Add a global before_script that runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq unzip, curls https://get.sdkman.io | bash, writes sdkman_auto_answer=true to /root/.sdkman/etc/config, sources /root/.sdkman/bin/sdkman-init.sh, installs gradle $GRADLE_VERSION via sdk, uses that Gradle version, echoes grailsVersion=$GRAILS_VERSION into gradle.properties, appends gradleWrapperVersion=2.14 to gradle.properties, runs ./gradlew --refresh-dependencies, and creates /root/.bowerrc with {\"allow_root\":true}. Define a build job named build that runs in the default stage and executes ./gradlew build. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are configured.
